_best_optimized_performance.assessment: Still deeply unprofitable - does not meet minimum viability (PF > 1.0)

_quarterly_breakdown.conclusion: Unprofitable in all 4 quarters. Even Q4 (best: PF 0.77) loses money.

_key_findings.4_root_cause: Pattern fires on bear market bounces that succeed, not fail
_key_findings.6_design_flaw: Avg loss ($25) > Avg win ($19) by 40-65% in all configs

_recommendations.reason: Cannot achieve profitability across 100 tested configurations
alternatives: Invert pattern logic (use S2 signals as LONG entries, not shorts)
Combine with S5 (funding + failed rally) for extreme selectivity
Require ML filter score > 0.7 to drastically reduce trade count
Redesign feature engineering (proper RSI divergence, OB quality scoring)

next_steps: Test pattern inversion (direction: long instead of short)
Require macro regime = crisis for extreme selectivity

archetypes._comment_s2_disabled: S2 failed optimization with PF 0.56 (target 1.4). Unprofitable in all 4 quarters of 2022. Pattern has fundamental design flaws that cannot be fixed with parameter tuning alone.
